title: Hemionitis welwitschii
taxonomy: Hemionitis welwitschii is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The genus Hemionitis is a part of the family Polypodiaceae, which consists of about 2,000 species of ferns. The species Hemionitis welwitschii is native to tropical Africa. It is also known as Welwitsch's shield fern.
